pageContext.name: Kyojuro Rengoku (Shake The Sword Burn Your Heart)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Kyojuro Rengoku (Shake The Sword Burn Your Heart) Statue!  This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Kyojuro Rengoku from Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 6.3' tall, Kyojuro is seen here ready to strike in this dynamic and exciting statue.  Demon Slayer fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Kyojuro Rengoku statue today!
